content: Hi, Hello everyone. I have a sick in spain. On the first day, my roommate's friend got Covid-19. We just had dinner together. the next day, my girlfriend got sick, tested for Covid-19 and came back positive. We went to the hospital at night. Tow of the four were positive. The doctir who received us was handsome and could speak four languages. The doctor prescribed medichine for us, 2 euros a box (Paracetamol kern pharma) on the third day, I had a sore throat and my test was positive. I had a fever and headache that day. I feel how my girlfriend feels. Her symptoms were a day earlier than mine. On the fourth day, my condition improved, but l still had headache and a scor throat. We took strepsils, throat soothed, antibiotics. Peaches and oranges and vitamin c. Thanks to my girlfriend for taking care of me.She likes to travel very much, and I will take her to travel when she is cured. A month later, I still have occasional cough and phlegm in my throat. My girlfriend made a full recovery. As far as I know, girls don't cough after recovering, but men do. If the Pfizer vaccine is available, I still recommend Pfizer. After contracting Covid-19, only sore throat, no fever. May you never get Covid-19. Bye-bye.
title: I have the COVID-19
